name: Mini Duels Battle
description: Super cool mini games are coming within a single game, in the Mini Duels Battle. These games consist of the Drunken Duel series, Drunken Boxing, Wrestling Games, Table games, and more. Just pick one of the games and try the challenge against your friend. You can play all of these popular games with your friend in 2 player game mode besides of single player game mode. The one who scores five before his/her opponent wins the battle. 16 games are ready to play. Lets begin!
tags: 2 Player, 2 Player Games, 2D, Action, Animal, Arcade, Arena, Ball, Ballon, Basketball, Battle, Best Games, Brain, Shoot
